creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: 

 - [tags] in issue Titles are deprecated
 - To signify maintainer approval: Please set the maintainer-approval attachment flag (to +) on patches for ports you maintain:

  Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

You will need to update your Bugzilla email address to the 'current' maintainer email address, and then update to the new address after approving
